body:
Owner asked me to reverse-engineer + enhance scripts/graveyard_reader.py. Done (patch-heavy/tooling lane). It's the redacted FTS5 indexer over _backup (cold storage holding sealed creds) - the same component O-G1 leaked through, so every enhancement preserves/strengthens the secret boundary and keeps existing function signatures (build_index/init_db/read_redacted_text/reset_db/get_text_hash/main) so test_graveyard_redaction stays valid.

ENHANCEMENTS:
- E1 portability: removed hardcoded C:\Users\Vi Chi paths -> repo-root-derived (parents[1]) + env overrides GRAVEYARD_DB/GRAVEYARD_BACKUP_DIR. Now runs on Windows AND Linux/CM5/sandbox.
- E2 fail-closed (the big one): after redact_sensitive_text, call contains_secret_shape() on BOTH content and path; if STILL secret-shaped, SKIP+count blocked_unredacted, never index. Defense-in-depth so a leak can't recur even if a new pattern slips redaction (directly hardens the O-G1 class).
- E3 atomic rebuild: --reset builds into <db>.tmp then os.replace() swaps it in after a clean close -> an interrupted/power-loss rebuild never corrupts or destroys the live index (maritime power-loss resilience, matches ledger pattern).
- E4 robustness: max-size guard (GRAVEYARD_MAX_FILE_BYTES, default 2MB) + binary sniff (skip NUL-byte files) + configurable extensions.
- E5 safe import of graveyard_redaction regardless of cwd.
- E6 auditable counts: blocked_unredacted / skipped_binary / skipped_large.
Preserved: redaction-first, FTS5, content-hash dedup, per-file isolation, redacted error output, ignore_dirs.

VERIFICATION: host file complete + py_compile clean (x3). DYNAMIC FUNCTIONAL TEST BLOCKED HERE by active §12 mount WRITE-lag - after I wrote the file, the sandbox served truncated reads of it across 12 attempts (cut at line 76), so I could not run it in-sandbox. REQUEST (Codex, stable/fresh sandbox): run `python -m unittest ai_chi.tests.test_graveyard_redaction` + a functional `build_index(reset=True)` rebuild and confirm 0 secret-shape rows + the new counts. I expect green (signatures unchanged, redaction strengthened not weakened). No gate crossed; only the tooling script edited (not ai_chi core / not executor / not a secret file).
constraints: tooling-script edit only; no ai_chi core / executor / gate touched
forbidden_actions: weaken redaction / index a secret-shaped value
point indexer at non-_backup roots without review
objective: Enhanced graveyard_reader.py (portability + fail-closed redaction + atomic rebuild + robustness); request stable-sandbox functional confirm
requested_output: Codex: in a stable sandbox run test_graveyard_redaction + a reset rebuild; confirm green, 0 secret-shape rows, new counts populate. Flag if any signature assumption in the tests changed.
summary: Reverse-engineered + enhanced scripts/graveyard_reader.py: E1 portable paths, E2 fail-closed contains_secret_shape verify before insert (never index residual secrets), E3 atomic temp-db->os.replace rebuild (power-loss safe), E4 binary/size guards, E5 safe import, E6 audit counts. Signatures preserved (tests stay valid); redaction strengthened. py_compile clean x3; dynamic run blocked by §12 mount write-lag -> Codex to confirm in stable sandbox. No gate crossed.
